name: Sammy
subtitle: behind the well since '83

ultimate_ability.label: Pour One for Yourself
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Sammy pours himself the short one Dante has, in forty years, never asked him not to pour. Restores 2 sanity, advances every active visitor's connection by 1 step. The well runs the well runs.

notes: Sammy. 61. The bartender at D'Ambrosio's since the boat opened in '83. The long-suffering Catholic loyalty Dante has relied on and quietly mocked. Knows where the water pitcher is. Knows when to pour himself one. Source: vol5 ch4 Emperor + ch3 Empress (recurring well-side regular).
